blockingIssues.description: sd-core/src/horizon.rs range_start()/range_end() still rely on .expect() in public code paths; since Horizon is publicly constructible, malformed variants can still panic (e.g. Horizon::Month(2026, 13)).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten enforcement of Step 6 evidence (manual verification/cargo doc) before allowing followedProcedure=true in worker handoffs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The fix-scrutiny-blocking-issues handoff reports followedProcedure=true but does not include manual verification evidence despite skill requirements.
